raw.n: Hermès International Société en commandite par actions

holdings.n: Hermès International Société en commandite par actions

holdings.infoBox: PJIO is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 7.62%, Samsung Electronics at 7.10%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.08%, Nebius Group at 4.90%, and Siemens Energy AG at 4.59%.

overview.description: The PGIM Jennison International Opportunities ETF (PJIO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides broad exposure to global ex-US stocks of any market capitalization. The fund seeks to invest in companies in the early growth stage. PJIO was launched on Dec 14, 2023 and is issued by PGIM.
